name: Chicken Breast Eden Isle
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap a slice of bacon around each half breast and secure with a toothpick.
2. Place the shredded beef on the bottom of an open pan.
3. Top the beef with the chicken breasts.
4. Pour the mixture of soup and sour cream over the chicken.
5. Bake at 300°F, covered with foil for the first hour.
6. Lower the temperature to 250°F and bake for 2 more hours.
7. Baste at halfway through the cooking time.
8. Remove the foil during the last half-hour of baking.
9. Remove the toothpicks from the chicken breasts.
10. Optionally, add a small amount of vermouth or sherry to enhance flavor. (For heartier portions, include half a boned chicken thigh wrapped inside each breast.)
